# terrible_community_general_vexata_volume (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) Volume name.

### Optional

- `size` (String) Volume size in M, G, T units. M=2^20, G=2^30, T=2^40 bytes.
- `state` (String) Creates/Modifies volume when present or removes when absent.
